jobs.name: email-check
jobs.description: Check emails every 15 minutes, draft replies for important ones

payload.message: Check my email inbox using himalaya. Summarize any new emails. If any require a reply, draft a response.

state.lastError: GrammyError: Call to 'sendMessage' failed! (403: Forbidden: bot was blocked by the user)

payload.message:
🔔 LinkedIn Morning Block (8:00 AM)

Time to engage on LinkedIn for Z.E Digital Tech growth:

• Comment on 5 AI/tech posts with meaningful insights
• React to 10 posts in your feed
• Check notifications and respond to comments on your posts

Focus hashtags: #AI #HospitalityTech #DigitalTransformation

This is your daily LinkedIn growth reminder.

🔔 LinkedIn Afternoon Block (2:00 PM)

Time for the second engagement session:

• Comment on 5 hospitality/tech posts (Sofia's target audience)
• Send 3-5 connection requests to:
  - Hotel GMs, CTOs, Innovation Managers
  - AI/ML professionals in DACH region
  - Tech journalists
• Find and comment on 1 trending industry post

Remember to personalize connection requests!

🔔 LinkedIn Evening Block (6:00 PM)

Final engagement session of the day:

• Engage with 3 posts from your connections
• Review analytics: Which comments got the most impressions?
• Save promising posts for content ideas
• Plan tomorrow's company post if it's your posting day

Weekly content schedule:
Mon: Industry Insight
Tue: Company Update
Wed: Thought Leadership
Thu: Case Study
Fri: Culture/Fun

📊 LinkedIn Weekly Review (Sunday)

Time to review this week's performance:

1. Check follower growth (Goal: 50/month)
2. Review top-performing posts
3. Analyze which comments drove most engagement
4. Note successful hashtags
5. Plan next week's content (batch write posts)

Update metrics in: ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory/linkedin-growth-plan.md
